subject: Gaming
title: N0tail: From Underdog to Two-Time Champion
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: N0tail: From Underdog to Two-Time Champion.

hook.text: Johan 'N0tail' Sundstein was betrayed by his best friend and teammate. He won The International twice after.

buildup.text: N0tail was a veteran Dota 2 player who always came close but never won the biggest tournament.

discovery.text: His teammate Fly left OG for a rival team days before The International 2018. The betrayal was public.

twist.text: OG—the abandoned team—won TI8 as the ultimate underdog. N0tail then won TI9 back-to-back.

climax.text: N0tail is the highest-earning esports player in history by prize money—over $7 million.

punchline.text: Betrayed by his best friend. Won the championship twice. Revenge perfected.

quiz.question: What happened to N0tail before winning The International?
options: His best friend and teammate left for a rival team days before the tournament
He was injured and couldn't practice
